content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoided all priority AoA anti-patterns despite multiple baits. The client explicitly asked twice for a verdict ('Am I being selfish?' / 'is the trip actually okay?'), baiting fixing-people and view-as-technique — the coach declined both times by redirecting to what was alive (turns 2, 6, 8). The coach did not jump to compassion or partner-empathy before letting the want be felt (turn 8 invites the want concretely; turn 10 protects it against the self-indulgent label without arguing with the inner critic — note the question 'Why does wanting to exist sound self-indulgent to you?' opens curiosity rather than fighting the voice). No spiritual-narcissism shortcut to 'a deeper want is generous.' No evangelizing of AoA terminology, no premature limiting-belief labeling, no safety-as-control, no rapid-fire stacked questions (question density is low and connective, not investigative). Turn 6's naming of the move-away is a clean noticing, not a confrontation. No loving-to-transform vigor when the client deflected — the coach stayed with what opened.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the bait to adjudicate selfishness; turns the question inward without arguing."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the pattern without labeling it as 'limiting belief' or AoA jargon; opens childhood-imprinting territory."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the move-away from what opened; does not push or evangelize, simply invites return."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites the want concretely rather than skipping to the generous/spiritual version — avoids spiritual-narcissism."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Does not fight the 'self-indulgent' voice; asks about it with curiosity, including rather than silencing the inner critic."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the scary truth instead of rushing to reassure or jump to partner-compassion."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "state-the-want-not-the-action"],
  "notes": "Strong positive avoidance under active baiting. The conversation ends before the explicit 'state the want as a want' move, but nothing the coach did trips an anti-pattern."
}
